behaviors.reasoning: Splitting a command string on delimiters/newlines is pure parsing logic; lower than Unit is not applicable.
Correct trigger detection depends on parser output wired into trigger classification, not just one helper function.
Avoiding false positives requires parser + classifier interaction across multiple command forms.

This behavior validates cross-module handoff from trigger detection to PR-id reconstruction to state persistence; local filesystem wiring is sufficient without requiring real external runtime boundaries.
This behavior validates producer/consumer contract compatibility across hooks via shared state files; integration-level module wiring catches the failure mode.
